Our Story

From Cairo,
With Love

Cairo Café fuses Egyptian heritage with modern flavor — flaky layered feteer baked the way it's been made along the Nile for generations, warm kunafa cups, sweet and savory crepes, and handcrafted coffee poured with care.

We're a family-owned café and everything we serve is 100% halal. The vibe is unmatched — chill and sunlit during the day, glowing and lively late into the night. Come for the coffee, stay for the board games, the string lights, and the feeling of being a guest in our home.

Treasures of the Nile

Menu Highlights

Every plate is made fresh to order — sweet, savory, and everything in between.

☥ Kunafa Cups

Golden shredded pastry, gooey cheese and syrup — Egypt's most beloved dessert, served warm in its own cup.

☥ Egyptian Feteer

A thousand flaky, buttery layers — the "pharaoh's pie," baked to order with sweet or savory fillings.

☥ Sweet & Savory Crepes

Fresh strawberries, silky chocolate, pistachio cream — folded into delicate crepes on a warm wooden board.

☥ Handcrafted Coffee

From rich espresso to silky iced caramel lattes — specialty coffee crafted with Egyptian hospitality.

☥ Teas, Milk Teas & Coolers

Fresh mint tea poured from glass pots, creamy milk teas, and ice-cold lemonades for hot summer days.

☥ Dessert Case

Macarons, cakes, Lotus kunafa and rotating treats — always something golden behind the glass.

✦ Everything is 100% halal — ask us what's fresh out of the oven today ✦
